tiktok.caption: 73% of renters think they need 20% down. That myth is costing you 14 years of wealth-building — here's what the bank won't tell you.

youtube_short.title: The 20% Down Myth Is Costing You 14 Years
title_alternatives: Banks Created This Rule to Keep You Renting
You Don't Need 20% Down — The Real Numbers
youtube_short.description: 73% of renters believe they need 20% down to buy a home — and that myth alone is keeping millions locked out for over a decade. Banks invented the 20% rule in 1934 to protect themselves, not you. FHA loans need just 3.5% down. VA and USDA buyers can qualify with zero. Don't hand your landlord another $252,000 while building zero equity. Check your FHA eligibility — the door might already be open. #firsttimehomebuyer #realestate #personalfinance #homebuying #FHAloan
